creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
PORT-UPDATE-MAINTAINER TIME OUT : x11/dgs

       According to:

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/bad.html

        The port x11/dsg has an unfetchable distfile.  I simply
uncommented the MASTER_SITE_GNU line and it fetched fine.  The insanely
simple patch is at:

http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/dgs.diff

** NOTE **

I emailed the maintainer, nakai@FreeBSD.org, on Sat, 6 Jan 2001 21:17:08
-0800 (PST) with this patch and have recieved no response.

Fix: This diff was generated by : diff -ruN dgs dgs.new
From : /usr/ports/x11
Also at : http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/dgs.diff
----------------------------------------------------------------
